# HostingQr

> HostingQr helps businesses host menus, images, and documents on public pages that can be shared using QR codes.

## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://hostingqr.com/): Product overview and how HostingQr works.
- [Pricing](https://hostingqr.com/pricing): Available plans and features.
- [Contact](https://hostingqr.com/contact): Contact HostingQr.
- [Privacy Policy](https://hostingqr.com/privacy): Privacy and analytics information.
- [Terms of Use](https://hostingqr.com/terms): Service terms.
